title: Nursery Rhyme. CCIX. Riddles.
content:
[A candle.]

        Little Nancy Etticoat,
        In a white petticoat,
        And a red nose;
        The longer she stands,
        The shorter she grows.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCIX. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
